releaseNotes:
• Fix: when a stream exhausts all reconnect attempts, the player now correctly returns to the channel list. The previous fix (v1.20.2) was blocked by the back-gesture guard and never fired.
• Full-screen reconnect overlay now shows "Retrying 1/6…" instead of a static "Reconnecting…" message.
• Multi-view cells now show a retry counter ("Retrying 1/6…") below the spinner during transient reconnects.
